diagrams.title: Function Call Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how control transfers from calling function to called function and back
diagrams.purpose: Understanding control flow and execution sequence in function calls

diagrams.title: Memory Stack During Function Call
diagrams.description: Illustrates stack frame allocation when a function is called
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how memory is managed during function execution

diagrams.title: Call by Value vs Call by Reference
diagrams.description: Compares how parameters are passed in both methods
elements: Call by Value: Different address for parameter
Call by Reference: Same address as original
diagrams.purpose: Understanding difference in parameter passing mechanisms
